briefdescription.para: Broken image for small-sized views.
Broken image for normal-sized views.
Broken image for large-sized views.
The type of broken image for image loading failures.

detaileddescription.para: Different broken image types allow different broken images to be used based on the size of the view that needs to display them. For example, a small icon view can use a compact broken image (SMALL), while a large image view can use a more detailed broken image (LARGE).

briefdescription.para: Creates an uninitialized UiConfig handle.
Destructor.
Copy constructor.
Move constructor.
Copy assignment operator.

simplesect.para: Reference to this

briefdescription.para: Move assignment operator.

simplesect.para: Reference to this

briefdescription.para: Applies the UiConfig as the global configuration for given application.

detaileddescription.para: This must be called exactly once, typically in main() before the application main loop starts. After this call, the config is frozen and its setter methods can no longer be used. Unit literals (_spx, _dp, _sdp) require this to be called before they can be used.
Calling Apply() more than once triggers an assertion failure.

briefdescription.para: Sets the scaling factor applied to spx and sdp units.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen (i.e. not yet call UiConfig::Apply()).

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the scaling factor.

simplesect.para: The scaling factor applied to spx and sdp units

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the DPI factor (dpi / baselineDpi).

simplesect.para: The config must be frozen (i.e. Apply() must have been called).
The computed DPI factor

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the scaled DPI factor (dpiFactor * scalingFactor).

simplesect.para: The config must be frozen (i.e. Apply() must have been called).
The computed scaled DPI factor

briefdescription.para: Sets the screen DPI used for dp and sdp unit calculations.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

parameterdescription.para: The dots-per-inch value of the target display

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the screen DPI.

simplesect.para: The dots-per-inch value of the target display

briefdescription.para: Sets the baseline DPI used as the reference for dp calculations.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the baseline DPI.

simplesect.para: The baseline dots-per-inch used as the reference for dp calculations

briefdescription.para: Sets the default key click policy for clickable views.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the default key click policy.

simplesect.para: The key click policy

briefdescription.para: Sets the predicate used to determine whether a key event triggers click execution (e.g. "Return", "KP_Enter").

detaileddescription.para: When a key event is received by a clickable View, this predicate is called with the key name. If it returns true, the View treats the key as a click execution key and fires the click action. The default predicate matches "Return" only.

simplesect.para: This parameter is a plain function pointer (ExecutionKeyPredicate). Lambdas with captures and member function pointers are not accepted. Only free functions or stateless lambdas may be used.
Passing nullptr restores the default predicate that matches "Return".
The config must not be frozen (i.e. Apply() must not have been called). Calling this method after Apply() triggers an assert in debug builds and is ignored in release builds.

parameterdescription.para: A function pointer matching the ExecutionKeyPredicate signature, or nullptr to restore the default

simplesect.para: Reference to this UiConfig for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the execution key predicate.

simplesect.para: The current execution key predicate function pointer

briefdescription.para: Sets the threshold for recognizing a key long-press.

detaileddescription.para: When a key is held down, the system generates repeated key press events. This threshold defines how many consecutive key press events must be received before the input is recognized as a long-press action.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

parameterdescription.para: The minimum number of consecutive key press events required to trigger a long-press

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the threshold for recognizing a key long-press.

simplesect.para: The minimum number of consecutive key press events required to trigger a long-press

briefdescription.para: Sets the tap recognizer time limit in milliseconds.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the tap recognizer time limit.

simplesect.para: The time limit in milliseconds

briefdescription.para: Sets an image to be displayed when image loading fails.

detaileddescription.para: This method configures a broken image that will be shown in image views (e.g., ImageView) when the requested image fails to load properly. Using different broken image types allows for appropriate broken images based on the target view size.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

parameterdescription.para: The type of broken image (SMALL, NORMAL, or LARGE)
The URL of the broken image to use

briefdescription.para: Gets the image URL to be displayed when image loading fails.

detaileddescription.para: Retrieves the broken image URL that was previously set for the specified broken image type. This image will be shown in image views when the requested image fails to load.

parameterdescription.para: The type of broken image (SMALL, NORMAL, or LARGE)

simplesect.para: A reference to the broken image URL string

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to clear focus when the Escape key is pressed.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable focus clearing on Escape key

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Retrieves whether to clear focus when the Escape key is pressed.

simplesect.para: True if focus clearing on Escape key is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to always show the keyboard focus indicator.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

parameterdescription.para: True to always show focus indicator

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Retrieves whether to always show the keyboard focus indicator.

simplesect.para: True if focus indicator is always shown

briefdescription.para: Sets the default font point-size for text elements.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

parameterdescription.para: The default font size in points

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the default font point-size.

simplesect.para: The default font size in points

briefdescription.para: Sets the default text color for text elements.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the default text color.

simplesect.para: The default text color

briefdescription.para: Sets the default placeholder text color.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

briefdescription.para: Returns the default placeholder text color.

simplesect.para: The default placeholder text color.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the placeholder text is shown when the control has focus.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

parameterdescription.para: True to show the placeholder text when focused, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns whether the placeholder text is shown when the control has focus.

simplesect.para: True if the placeholder text is shown when focused, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets the marquee speed in pixels per second.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

parameterdescription.para: The marquee speed in pixels per second

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the marquee speed.

simplesect.para: The marquee speed in pixels per second

briefdescription.para: Sets the number of complete loops for marquee.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the number of complete loops for marquee.

simplesect.para: The number of loops

briefdescription.para: Sets the amount of time to delay the start of marquee and further loops.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the amount of time to delay the start of marquee and further loops.

simplesect.para: The delay time in seconds

briefdescription.para: Sets the gap before marquee wraps.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the gap before marquee wraps.

simplesect.para: The gap in pixels

briefdescription.para: Sets the marquee stop behaviour.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the marquee stop behaviour.

simplesect.para: The marquee stop mode

briefdescription.para: Sets the marquee orientation.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the marquee orientation.

simplesect.para: The marquee orientation

briefdescription.para: Sets whether Label uses asynchronous text rendering by default.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable asynchronous rendering for Label by default, false to use synchronous rendering.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves whether Label uses asynchronous text rendering by default.

simplesect.para: True if asynchronous rendering is enabled for Label by default

briefdescription.para: Sets the default interaction effect applied to views when AsInteractive() is called.

simplesect.para: The config must not be frozen.

parameterdescription.para: A Trait implementing InteractionEffectInterface, or Trait{} to disable the default

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Returns the default interaction effect.

simplesect.para: The default interaction effect handle, or an uninitialized Trait if none is set

briefdescription.para: This constructor is used internally to wrap an implementation object.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to the internal UiConfig implementation

briefdescription.para: Creates a new UiConfig with default values.

simplesect.para: An initialized UiConfig handle

briefdescription.para: Downcasts a handle to a UiConfig handle.

detaileddescription.para: If handle points to a UiConfig, the downcast produces a valid handle. If not, the returned handle is left uninitialized.

simplesect.para: A handle to a UiConfig or an uninitialized handle

briefdescription.para: An immutable-after-init configuration object for dali-ui global settings.

detaileddescription.para: UiConfig holds display and scaling parameters that affect unit calculations (spx, dp, sdp) across the entire dali-ui framework.
Setter methods may only be called before the config is applied via Apply(). After that point, any setter call will trigger an assertion failure.
